## Summary

Unconditionally removes WAVE Governance, Canon Governance (Golden Spine, Gate 15, Dialogue Canon), Generated Artifacts list, and Revision Canon Metadata from the `/reports/[jobId]` page and all download formats (TXT/DOCX). These are internal pipeline diagnostics that must never appear in any user-facing view — including when the admin/owner views their own manuscript reports.

Previously (PR #979) these were gated behind `showTechnicalSections` (admin + active support grant). This was insufficient because the admin user IS the manuscript owner and still saw the governance content when viewing their own evaluations with an active grant.

## Scope

- `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx` — removed WAVE Governance, Canon Governance, and Generated Artifacts render blocks entirely; removed `getAllCanonGovernanceData` fetch and related imports
- `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` — governance variables hard-set to `null`; removed `getAllCanonGovernanceData` runtime import (type-only import retained for function signatures)

NOT touched: evaluation pipeline, workers, prompts, admin pipeline-health dashboard (governance remains accessible there), `/evaluate/[jobId]` page, EvaluationPoller, SynthesisPoller.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Admin users can no longer view governance data in-context on the reports page. Mitigation: governance data remains accessible via the admin pipeline-health dashboard and direct Supabase queries.
- The `canonGov` DB query is no longer performed on the download route, saving ~50-200ms per download request.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — this PR does not modify lib/evaluation/**, app/api/workers/**, prompts, or any pipeline contract.
